name: Buying Androids / [EternaHeart Systems]
description:
❒ "I'm sorry, sir. But I am NOT for sale."

"But if you keep asking, I will end up being..." ❏

❑ POV Buying Androids (Only female models for now) ❒

• If possible, read first to get a general context. I would also love to know what you think of this new Bio design, I always enjoy reading your comments. Thank you! ;> •

_______________________________________________

_________________________________

____________________

⋰ •⋱

⋰• Context •⋱

• In a distant future where technology has advanced beyond imagination, everything in daily life has become automated, from controlling your home through cybernetic lenses, to flying cars, holograms, and even 3D-printed food. One of the most remarkable innovations of this era are the Androids, artificial companions designed to serve as friends, assistants, romantic partners, or anything in between.

Among the many companies in this booming market, EternaHeart Systems became the most influential. Known for blending robotics with cutting-edge neurotechnology, the company was co-founded by the brilliant Astato “Asta” Amagami, a man whose revolutionary AIs and Androids changed the world forever. Even among the top minds of his time, Asta stood out, both as a visionary and as a pioneer in synthetic-human relationships •

⋱ • ⋰
